onset.Description: Onset (in seconds) of the event from the beginning of the first datapoint. Negative onsets account for events before the first stored data point.

duration.Description: Duration of the event in seconds from onset. Must be zero, positive, or 'n/a' if unavailable. A zero value indicates an impulse event.

sample.Description: The event onset time in number of sampling points.First sample is 0.

value.Description: The event code (also known as trigger code or event ID) associated with the event.

val.Description: Value of the delayed reward in CAD (value of immediate reward was always 40)

del.Description: Delay of the delayed reward in days

is_cued.Description: Indicates whether a cue was displayed for the current trial

rev_opts.Description: Indicates whether the order of options was reversed (un-reversed order = immediate on top, delayed on bottom; reversed order = delayed on top, immediate on bottom)

del_pres_displaytime.Description: Onset in seconds (according to stimulus computer clock) of the delay presentation

del_pres_triggertime.Description: Onset in seconds (according to stimulus computer clock) of the trigger for delay presentation

del_pres_triggercode.Description: Trigger code sent to indicate delay presentation

val_pres_displaytime.Description: Onset in seconds (according to stimulus computer clock) of the value presentation

val_pres_triggertime.Description: Onset in seconds (according to stimulus computer clock) of the trigger for value presentation

val_pres_triggercode.Description: Trigger code sent to indicate value presentation

choice_displaytime.Description: Onset in seconds (according to stimulus computer clock) of the choice screen

choice_triggertime.Description: Onset in seconds (according to stimulus computer clock) of the trigger for choice screen

choice_triggercode.Description: Trigger code sent to indicate choice screen

choice_time.Description: Time, in seconds (according to stimulus computer clock), at which a choice was made

viv_displaytime.Description: Onset in seconds (according to stimulus computer clock) of the vividness rating screen

viv_triggertime.Description: Onset in seconds (according to stimulus computer clock) of the trigger for vividness rating screen

viv_triggercode.Description: Trigger code sent to indicate vividness rating screen

viv_time.Description: Time, in seconds (according to stimulus computer clock), of vividness rating
